message:
fix(abi): add missing set_abi_errno() calls on membrane Deny paths

Systematic fix for errno propagation when operations are denied by
runtime policy. Previously, Deny paths returned error values (-1, NULL,
etc.) without setting errno, making it impossible for callers to
distinguish policy denials from other errors.

Affected ABI families and functions:
- dirent: closedir
- dlfcn: dlclose
- inet: inet_pton, inet_ntop
- io: dup, dup2, pipe, fcntl, pipe2, dup3, ioctl, pread, pwrite,
  readv, writev, sendfile, copy_file_range, preadv, pwritev,
  preadv2, pwritev2, splice, tee, vmsplice, memfd_create
- resource: getrlimit, setrlimit
- socket: accept, bind, connect, listen, and related calls
- stdlib: atexit, system, putenv
- termios: tcgetattr, tcsetattr, tcdrain, tcflush, tcflow, tcsendbreak
- unistd: 40+ functions including read, write, close, stat, fstat,
  lstat, access, chdir, unlink, rmdir, link, symlink, readlink,
  fsync, fdatasync, open, rename, mkdir, chmod, chown, truncate,
  ftruncate, flock, openat, fstatat, getrandom, statx, fallocate

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
